calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court granted the Decree changing Petitioner's name to Natashja Remedioa de Wolfe. Decree signed in open court.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-24-2002 Off Calendar
